design_philosophy: Clean dark appearance ('oscuro limpio'). Focus on practical, dense, yet highly legible data tables. Navigation must be simple, providing quick access to API Documentation (Swagger-style), Teams, Players, Injuries, and ATS statistics.

layout_and_spacing.app_layout: Sidebar navigation (left) + Main content area (right). Maximize width for data tables.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/50 backdrop-blur-xl hidden md:flex flex-col

component_guidelines.api_key_display: Prominent placement at the top of the documentation or dashboard. Terminal-style block (bg-black border border-zinc-800) with a prominent 'Copy' button. Use lucide-react 'Copy'.
component_guidelines.documentation: Swagger-style layout. Clear visual distinction between endpoints (GET vs POST). Use method badges (e.g., green for GET, blue for POST). Code snippets in IBM Plex Mono.
component_guidelines.tables: Extremely dense but legible. Use alternating row colors (bg-zinc-900 / bg-zinc-950) or 1px border-b border-zinc-800. Sticky headers. Sticky first column for Player/Team names.
component_guidelines.filters: Horizontal bar above tables. Use Shadcn Select and Inputs. Keep them compact.
component_guidelines.admin_login: Simple modal or dedicated route. Requires password input to reveal the 'Manual Update' action.
component_guidelines.buttons: Flat design. Primary CTA in solid #3B82F6, text white. Secondary in bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Data rows: bg-zinc-800/50 on hover. Buttons: slight opacity change or brightness increase.

testing_attributes: Every interactive element (Copy button, filters, row items, nav links) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build the frontend using React (.js/.jsx files only, no TypeScript).
Use Tailwind CSS for styling and Shadcn UI for components.
Set up a layout with a fixed sidebar and a scrollable main area.
Prioritize the Swagger-style API documentation view as the default landing view, prominently displaying the global API Key.
Create dedicated views for Teams, Players, Injuries, and ATS, utilizing dense Shadcn Tables with filtering capabilities.
Include a hidden/protected Admin section to trigger the manual data scraping update via the POST /funcion endpoint.
Ensure the entire application adheres to the 'oscuro limpio' (clean dark) aesthetic, utilizing the provided zinc and primary blue color palette.
